title: Advertisement of psychological services
doc_html:
§2362. Advertisement of psychological services

            The board may promulgate regulations to prohibit deceptive advertisements and representations concerning psychological services and may enforce this Section and its regulations in accordance with the provisions of R.S. 37:2361.

            Added by Acts 1964, No. 347, §12; Acts 1987, No. 915, §2, eff. Sept. 1, 1987; Acts 2022, No. 271, §2.

{{NOTE: SEE ACTS 1987, NO. 915, §3.}}
doc_text:
§2362.  Advertisement of psychological services
The board may promulgate regulations to prohibit deceptive advertisements and
representations concerning psychological services and may enforce this Section and its
regulations in accordance with the provisions of R.S. 37:2361.
Added by Acts 1964, No. 347, §12; Acts 1987, No. 915, §2, eff. Sept. 1, 1987; Acts
2022, No. 271, §2.
{{NOTE:  SEE ACTS 1987, NO. 915, §3.}}
